data.body: PASS 1 (T8 — LLM/prompt structural-completeness probe): PASS, no findings. The triggered-overlays plan defines an LLM-routed overlay system whose referenced structures are fully specified and tool-verified: the T1-T12 catalog, the registry `trigger` field, deterministic-vs-LLM `overlay_routing` ("llm"/"det"), and `applies_at` level gating all resolve to concrete, defined entries (criteria_v8.json T8 carries a full scenario + 5-item checklist + trigger + overlay_routing; registry.py `applies()` implements the value vocabulary — levels/container_only/suppress_when/suppress_types). No schema/enum is referenced whose vocabulary is undefined; routing protocol is co-located with the registry descriptor; no ambiguous counter/state increment; the E4 rationale (LLM-route T10/T11/T12 because deterministic keywords over-fire) is the specified fallback for the high-FP keyword path. No instruction-locality / pink-elephant antipattern found.
